source.description: Six-panel raster process contact sheet generated for the July 1, 2026 waffle ice cream cone lesson.
source.notes: The contact sheet must keep one cone pose, crop, scale, and paper texture from construction through the finished sketch.

process_strategy: The sequence establishes the scoop, cone, rim, waffle grid, sprinkles, and shadow before the final panel only darkens keeper lines and strengthens restrained colored-pencil accents.

final_elements.name: round ice cream scoop
final_elements.description: A rounded scoop sitting above the cone with a slightly uneven lower edge.

final_elements.name: waffle cone triangle
final_elements.description: A tapered cone shape centered under the scoop.

final_elements.name: scoop drips and cone rim
final_elements.description: A wavy scoop edge plus an oval rim where the ice cream meets the cone.

final_elements.name: clean outside contour
final_elements.description: A clearer outline for the scoop, rim, and cone silhouette.

final_elements.name: waffle grid
final_elements.description: Crossed diagonal waffle lines on the already drawn cone.

final_elements.name: sprinkles
final_elements.description: Small scattered sprinkle marks on the scoop.

final_elements.name: soft shadow and restrained color
final_elements.description: Light tan cone color, pale pink scoop accents, and a small cast shadow.

frames.visible_job: Places the round scoop guide and tapered cone guide.
Adds the wavy lower scoop edge and oval cone rim.
Clarifies the scoop, rim, and cone outside edges.
Adds the waffle grid on the cone and sprinkles on the scoop.
Adds tan cone color, pale scoop accents, and a soft shadow to already drawn forms.

final_step.visible_job: Darkens keeper contours, clarifies sprinkles and waffle lines, and deepens the restrained color and shadow already present.

rejection_checks: No scoop, cone, rim, waffle line, sprinkle, color area, or shadow should first appear in the final image.
No frame may color or shade a feature that was not already visible earlier.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same cone pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
